title: microsoft/VITRA
abstract:
[ICRA 2026] VITRA: Scalable Vision-Language-Action Model Pretraining for Robotic Manipulation with Real-Life Human Activity Videos

V ITRA : Scalable Vision-Language-Action Model Pretraining for Robotic Manipulation with Real-Life Human Activity Videos V ITRA is a novel approach for pretraining Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models for robotic manipulation using large-scale, unscripted, real-world videos of human hand activities. Treating human hand as dexterous robot end-effector, we show that in-the-wild egocentric human videos without any annotations can be transformed into data formats fully aligned with existing robotic V-L-A training data in terms of task granularity and labels. We create a human hand V-L-A dataset containing over 1 million episodes. We further develop a VLA model with a causal action transformer trained on this dataset. It demonstrates strong zero-shot human-hand action prediction in entirely new scenes and serves as a cornerstone for few-shot finetuning and adaptation to real-world robotic manipulation. ***For video demonstrations, please refer to our [project page](https://microsoft.github.io/VITRA/).*** --- ## 🚩 New & Updates * **[2026-02-09]** 🚀 Release the finetuning dataset collected by teleoperation. * **[2025-12-05]** 🚀 Release the code for performing zero-shot inference using a single image. * **[2025-11-30]** 🚀 Our code, pretrained models, and datasets are now open-sourced. * **[2025-10-24]** 🚀 **VITRA** paper is released on arXiv. --- ## 🤗 Pretrained Models and Datesets Our pretrained model and datasets are available on the huggingface hub: Hugging Face Model #Params Description VITRA-VLA-3B 3B Base VLA model pretrained on Human Hand Data. **Note: Our base VLA model is finetuned from [Paligemma2](https://huggingface.co/google/paligemma2-3b-mix-224). if you do not have access to [Paligemma2](https://huggingface.co/google/paligemma2-3b-mix-224), please request permission on the [official website](https://huggingface.co/google/paligemma2-3b-mix-224).** Hugging Face Dataset Sub Datasets Dataset Name Number of Episodes VITRA-1M ego4d_cooking_and_cleaning 454,244 ego4d
abstract_zh: VITRA 是一种新颖的预训练方法，旨在利用大规模、无脚本的真实世界人类手部活动视频，为机器人操作预训练视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型。通过将人类手部视为灵巧的机器人末端执行器，我们展示了无需任何标注的野外自我中心人类视频，可以转化为与现有机器人 V-L-A 训练数据在任务粒度和标签上完全对齐的数据格式。我们创建了一个包含超过 100 万条片段的人类手部 V-L-A 数据集。进一步，我们开发了一个基于因果动作变换器的 VLA 模型，在该数据集上训练。该模型在全新场景中展现出强大的零样本人类手部动作预测能力，并作为少样本微调和适应真实机器人操作的基石。
tldr_zh: 利用百万级人类手部视频预训练VLA模型，实现零样本动作预测与机器人操作迁移。
cover_zh: 不用机器人数据也能训｜用人类手部视频预训练VLA模型，零样本迁移到真实操作

judge.reason: 官方VLA预训练方法，利用人类视频构建大规模数据集，开源模型和代码，ICRA 2026论文。

>[!abstract] 一句话总结：将人类手部视为灵巧机器人末端执行器，把野外第一人称视频转化为与机器人VLA数据格式对齐的样本，构建超100万episode的人类手部数据集，并训练因果动作变换器模型（VITRA-VLA-3B）。


# 一、动机

> 现有机器人VLA模型训练依赖大量标注数据，扩展性差。利用大规模无标注人类手部活动视频预训练，可降低对昂贵机器人数据采集的依赖。


# 二、方法

> 将人类手部视为灵巧机器人末端执行器，把野外第一人称视频转化为与机器人VLA数据格式对齐的样本，构建超100万episode的人类手部数据集，并训练因果动作变换器模型（VITRA-VLA-3B）。


# 三、核心实验结果

> 1) 构建了超100万episode的人类手部VLA数据集（VITRA-1M）；2) 模型在全新场景中实现零样本人类手部动作预测；3) 通过少样本微调可有效适配真实机器人操作任务。


# 四、对我的启发

> 利用大规模无标注人类视频进行VLA预训练是降低机器人数据依赖的有效途径，但需注意手部与机器人执行器的域差异对迁移的影响。
